---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Madeleine Thomson"
date: "2025-02-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(openxlsx)
library(lubridate)

```

This document contains code for cleaning and cross-referencing data entered in the data collection app Epicollect5 as part of Activity 1 of PSF's Salmon-Herring interactions project. The Epicollect5 form *PSF Gastric Lavage Sampling* contains all salmonid data recorded in the lab, including data from external collaborators such as DFO (Trawl Survey Fish). Epicollect5 creates several data sheets per form that can be cross-referenced to eachother using auto-generated ID columns.

#Load data

```{r}
#working directory
setwd("C:/Users/madeleinethomson/OneDrive/Herring-SRIF/Stomach-Contents/")

#date data was downloaded from Epicollect
# Download_Date <- Sys.Date()
Download_Date <- "2026-04-26"

sampling_day <- read.csv(paste0("./Epicollect-Downloads/downloaded_data/psf-gastric-lavage-sampling-csv-", Download_Date, "/form-1__sample-information.csv"),sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA"))

stom <- read.csv(paste0("./Epicollect-Downloads/downloaded_data/psf-gastric-lavage-sampling-csv-", Download_Date, "/form-2__stomach-contents.csv"),sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA"))

fish <- read.csv(paste0("./Epicollect-Downloads/downloaded_data/psf-gastric-lavage-sampling-csv-", Download_Date, "/branch-1__fish.csv"),sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA"))

intact_invert <- read.csv(paste0("./Epicollect-Downloads/downloaded_data/psf-gastric-lavage-sampling-csv-", Download_Date, "/branch-2__intact-prey.csv"),sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA"))

stom_summary_we <- read.csv("./Winter-Ecology-Transfer/Data-Reformatting/2026-07-14-psf-winter-A1-stom-stomach-summary.csv", sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA")) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         analysis_date = as.Date(analysis_date)) %>%
  mutate(survey_name = "BCSRIF Herring", salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY")

stom_fish_we <- read.csv("./Winter-Ecology-Transfer/Data-Reformatting/2026-07-14-psf-winter-A1-stom-fish-prey.csv", sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA")) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         analysis_date = as.Date(analysis_date)) %>%
  mutate(survey_name = "BCSRIF Herring", salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY")


stom_isotope_we <- read.csv("./Winter-Ecology-Transfer/Data-Reformatting/2026-07-14-psf-winter-A1-stom-isotope-prey.csv", sep=",", na.strings=c("","NA")) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         analysis_date = as.Date(analysis_date)) %>%
  mutate(survey_name = "BCSRIF Herring", salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY")
```

#Rename cross-referencing columns

```{r}

sampling_day <- sampling_day %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(created_at, uploaded_at, created_by, title)) %>% 
  rename(ec5_uuid_day = ec5_uuid) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"))

stom <- stom %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(uploaded_at, created_by, title)) %>%
  rename(ec5_uuid_stom = ec5_uuid, 
         ec5_uuid_day = ec5_parent_uuid)

fish <- fish %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(created_at, uploaded_at, created_by, title)) %>%
  rename(ec5_uuid_stom = ec5_branch_owner_uuid)

intact_invert <- intact_invert %>% 
  rename(ec5_uuid_stom = ec5_branch_owner_uuid)
```

#General wrangling

```{r}

#review regions
sort(unique(sampling_day$general_location))

#fill in survey name = "BCSRIF Herring" if the team is not DFO
sampling_day <- sampling_day %>% mutate(survey_name = case_when(
  team %in% c("UVic/PSF", "Cowichan", "A-Tlegay", "Tla'amin") ~ "BCSRIF Herring",
  TRUE ~ survey_name))

unique(sampling_day$survey_name)
#no NAs - good

#ensure species codes are only recorded under the trawl survey
sampling_day <- sampling_day %>% mutate(trawl_species_code = case_when(
  survey_name != "SOG Midwater Salmon Trawl" ~ NA,
  TRUE ~ trawl_species_code))

#extract analysis date
stom$analysis_date <- as.Date(sub("T.*", "", stom$created_at)) 

#general formatting
stom <- stom %>% 
  #relocate analysis date column
  relocate(analysis_date, .after = created_at) %>%
  #If salmon sample type was not recorded, assign stomach contents only
  mutate(salmon_sample_type = 
           case_when(is.na(salmon_sample_type) ~ "Stomach Contents ONLY",
           TRUE ~ salmon_sample_type))

#check that it worked (shouldn't be any NAs)
unique(stom$salmon_sample_type)


```

#Fix salmon isotope codes

```{r}
#look at stomach codes
unique(stom$salmon_code_SI)
unique(stom$salmon_fin_code_SI)

#combine two columns that have isotope codes
stom <- stom %>%
  mutate(salmon_code_SI = case_when(is.na(salmon_code_SI) ~ salmon_fin_code_SI,
                                    is.na(salmon_fin_code_SI) ~ salmon_code_SI))

#look at combined column
names <- unique(stom$salmon_code_SI)

#remove second column
stom <- stom %>% dplyr::select(-salmon_fin_code_SI)

#do some manual fixes
stom <- stom %>%
  mutate(salmon_code_SI = case_when(
    salmon_code_SI == 458 & lavage_bag == 1063 ~ "TRAWL-458",
    salmon_code_SI == 459 & lavage_bag == 1060 ~ "TRAWL-459",
    salmon_code_SI == 460 & lavage_bag == 1061 ~ "TRAWL-460",
    salmon_code_SI == 485 & lavage_bag == 1276 ~ "TRAWL-485",
    salmon_code_SI == 488 & lavage_bag == 1274 ~ "TRAWL-488",
    salmon_code_SI == 491 & lavage_bag == 1278 ~ "TRAWL-491",
    salmon_code_SI == 498 & lavage_bag == 1822 ~ "TRAWL-498",
    salmon_code_SI == 504 & lavage_bag == 1846 ~ "TRAWL-504",
    salmon_code_SI == 530 & lavage_bag == 1081 ~ "TRAWL-530",
    TRUE ~ salmon_code_SI))


#do the reformatting
stom <- stom %>% mutate(salmon_code_SI = case_when(
  
  grepl("CS_|CR_|CS|Cs_", salmon_code_SI) ~ 
    paste0("CS_", sprintf("%03d", as.integer(gsub("CS_|CR_|CS|Cs_", "", 
                                                  salmon_code_SI)))),
  
  grepl("JHS_|JHS-", salmon_code_SI) ~ 
    paste0("JHS_", sprintf("%03d", as.integer(gsub("JHS_|JHS-", "", 
                                                   salmon_code_SI)))),
  
  grepl("TRAWL-F|TRAWL_|Trawl-|TRWAL-F", salmon_code_SI) ~
    paste0("TRAWL-", sprintf("%03d", as.integer(gsub("TRAWL-F|TRAWL_|Trawl-", "", 
                                                     salmon_code_SI)))),
  
  TRUE ~ salmon_code_SI  #leave unchanged if it doesn't match
  ))

#check that it worked
names <- sort(unique(stom$salmon_code_SI))

#fix NA values (altered by the reformatting)
stom$salmon_code_SI[stom$salmon_code_SI == "CS_ NA"] <- NA
stom$salmon_code_SI[stom$salmon_code_SI == "JHS_ NA"] <- NA
stom$salmon_code_SI[stom$salmon_code_SI == "TRAWL- NA"] <- NA

#check that it worked
names <- sort(unique(stom$salmon_code_SI))

```

#QC - check for missing fish species

```{r}
#some fish branches with no species recorded?
unique(fish$fish_species)

#retrieve rows with missing species - go back into Epicollect data to fix
test <- fish %>% group_by(ec5_uuid_stom) %>% filter(any(is.na(fish_species)))
test <- sampling_day %>%
  full_join(stom) %>%
  right_join(test)
nrow(test)

#some fish branches species is recorded as "Other"
test <- fish %>% filter(fish_species == "Other")
test <- sampling_day %>%
  full_join(stom) %>%
  right_join(test)
nrow(test)

#check that ID features match species assigned
test <- fish %>% 
  group_by(fish_species) %>%
  summarise(id_features = list(unique(id_features))) %>%
  unnest(id_features)

```

#QC - clean and fill scale book numbers

```{r}
stom <- stom %>%
  group_by(analysis_date) %>%
  arrange(created_at) %>%
  mutate(scale_book_fill = scale_book) %>%
  fill(scale_book_fill, .direction = "down") %>%
  mutate(scale_book = case_when(salmon_scale_status == "Yes" ~ scale_book_fill,
                                scale_book == "APSF0268" ~ "PSF0268",
                                scale_book == "CAN'TDETERMINESCALE" ~ NA,
                                TRUE ~ scale_book)) %>%
  #remove extra spaces or underscores
  mutate(scale_book = gsub("_", "", scale_book)) %>%
  mutate(scale_book = gsub(" ", "", scale_book)) %>%
  #convert PSF scale books to PSFXXXX form
  mutate(scale_book = case_when(nchar(scale_book) <= 3 ~ paste0("PSF", str_pad(as.factor(scale_book), width = 4, pad = "0")), TRUE ~ as.factor(scale_book))) %>%
  mutate(scale_book = toupper(scale_book))

sort(unique(stom$scale_book))

#check for missing scale book
test <- stom %>% filter(is.na(scale_book) & !is.na(scale_no))
nrow(test)

#check for duplicate scale ID
test <- stom %>%
  mutate(scale_id = paste(scale_book, scale_no, sep = "-")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(scale_no)) %>%
  filter(duplicated(scale_id) | duplicated(scale_id, fromLast = TRUE))
nrow(test)

```



#QC - check otolith vial numbers


```{r}
# sort(unique(fish$otolith_vial))

#make some manual corrections

#add in an otolith entry that was taken later
fish <- fish %>%
  mutate(otolith_vial = case_when(fish_code_SI == "I24-0011" ~ "H24-0419",
                                  TRUE ~ otolith_vial))

#comments were accidentally entered under otolith vial column
fish <- fish %>% 
  mutate(fish_comments = case_when(
    otolith_vial %in% c(
      "No number, sample information written on vial.",
      "Just the dentary free floating. Maybe from that larval fish",
      "Just vertebrae low confidence Stomach contents from bag not physical stomach",
      "no ID bones ") ~ paste(otolith_vial, fish_comments, sep = "; "),
    TRUE ~ fish_comments)) %>%
  mutate(otolith_vial = case_when(
    otolith_vial %in% c(
      "No number, sample information written on vial.",
      "Just the dentary free floating. Maybe from that larval fish",
      "Just vertebrae low confidence Stomach contents from bag not physical stomach",
      "no ID bones ") ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ otolith_vial))

#these have unusual formatting
test <- fish %>% filter(otolith_vial %in% c(
   "U25-0001", "S24-0001", "X25-0001", "BCSRIF_077", "H25--0406",
   "H25-0127f", "0.0681", "0.0736", "24-0001", "24-0002", "24-0003"))

#weights were accidentally entered under otolith vial column
fish <- fish %>% 
  mutate(fish_mass_g = case_when(
    otolith_vial == "0.0736" ~ 0.0736,
    otolith_vial == "0.0681" ~ 0.0681,
    TRUE ~ fish_mass_g)) %>%
  mutate(otolith_vial = case_when(
    otolith_vial == "0.0736" ~ NA,
    otolith_vial == "0.0681" ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ otolith_vial)) 

#typos in code entered
fish <- fish %>% mutate(otolith_vial = case_when(
  otolith_vial == "H25-0127f" ~ "H25-0127", 
  otolith_vial == "S24-0001" ~ "L24-0001",
  otolith_vial == "H25--0406" ~ "H25-0406",
  TRUE ~ otolith_vial))

#what remains are non-forage fish that received an ad-hoc code from the processor
#I will just ignore these for now
test <- fish %>% filter(otolith_vial %in% c(
   "U25-0001", "S24-0001", "X25-0001", "BCSRIF_077", "H25--0406",
   "H25-0127f", "0.0681", "0.0736", "24-0001", "24-0002", "24-0003"))

fish <- fish %>%
  mutate(
    prefix = sub("-.*", "", otolith_vial),
    num = suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub(".*-", "", otolith_vial))),
    otolith_vial2 = if_else(
      prefix %in% c("A23","L23","H23","A24","L24","H24","A25","L25","H25") & !is.na(num),
      paste0(prefix, "-", sprintf("%04d", num)), otolith_vial)) %>%
  relocate(otolith_vial2, .after = otolith_vial)

sort(unique(fish$otolith_vial2))

fish <- fish %>% dplyr::select(-otolith_vial) %>% rename(otolith_vial = otolith_vial2)
colnames(fish)

#check for fish with otoliths taken but no vial number recorded
test <- fish %>% filter(otolith_count > 0 & is.na(otolith_vial))
test <- sampling_day %>%
  full_join(stom) %>%
  right_join(test)%>%
  dplyr::select(date, general_location, ec5_uuid_stom, lavage_bag, 
                fish_species, otolith_count, otolith_vial, fish_comments)
nrow(test)
#most of these are non-forage fish
#two are herring - but already tried to resolve and couldn't

#check for duplicated codes
test <- fish %>%
  filter(!is.na(otolith_vial)) %>%
  filter(duplicated(otolith_vial) | duplicated(otolith_vial, fromLast = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(otolith_vial)

test <- sampling_day %>%
  full_join(stom) %>%
  right_join(test) %>%
  dplyr::select(survey_name, date, general_location, analysis_date, lavage_bag, 
                fish_species, otolith_count, otolith_vial)
nrow(test)

#address duplicated codes
fish <- fish %>% mutate(otolith_vial = case_when(
  otolith_vial == "H24-0063" & 
    ec5_uuid_stom == "acdbae50-7471-11f0-a9c8-73ec6997cf98" ~ "H25-0063", 
  #duplicate "H24-0103", but this entry was created first and the size of the imaged otolith
  #is more appropriate to that time of year than the other entry
  otolith_vial == "H24-0103" &
    ec5_uuid_stom == "45f418a0-cea7-11ef-bddc-558971f8f8a0" ~ "H24-0102",
  otolith_vial == "H24-0143" &
    ec5_uuid_stom == "822ccac6-850d-4fdc-8340-33ba0c6c7790" ~ "H25-0143",
  TRUE ~ otolith_vial))


#check for gaps in "H25-" sequence
test <- fish %>%
  filter(grepl("H25-", otolith_vial)) %>%
  summarise(missing = list(setdiff(seq(min(num), max(num)), num)))
test$missing

#check for gaps in "H24-" sequence
test <- fish %>%
  filter(grepl("H24-", otolith_vial)) %>%
  summarise(missing = list(setdiff(seq(min(num), max(num)), num)))
test$missing

#check for gaps in "H23-" sequence
test <- fish %>%
  filter(grepl("H23-", otolith_vial)) %>%
  summarise(missing = list(setdiff(seq(min(num), max(num)), num)))
test$missing
#none - hooray!

#check for gaps in "L25-" sequence
test <- fish %>%
  filter(grepl("L25-", otolith_vial)) %>%
  summarise(missing = list(setdiff(seq(min(num), max(num)), num)))
test$missing

#check for gaps in "L24-" sequence
test <- fish %>%
  filter(grepl("L24-", otolith_vial)) %>%
  summarise(missing = list(setdiff(seq(min(num), max(num)), num)))
test$missing


#check for codes where species doesn't match



#check for rows with otoliths recorded, but no otolith code



# 
# test <- fish %>%
#   filter(!is.na(otolith_vial))
# 
# test <- sampling_day %>%
#   full_join(stom) %>%
#   right_join(test) %>%
#   dplyr::select(ec5_uuid_stom, survey_name, date, 
#                 general_location, analysis_date, lavage_bag, 
#                 fish_species, otolith_count, otolith_vial, prefix, num)
# 
# setwd("C:/Users/madeleinethomson/OneDrive/Herring-SRIF/Stomach-Contents/")
# write.csv(test, paste0("./QC-Records/Otolith-Code-QC-", Sys.Date(), ".csv"))
```

#QC - check for improperly recorded weights
 
```{r}

bad_weight_stom <- stom %>% filter(combined_mass_g < 0 | combined_mass_g == 0 & !is.na(remaining_prey) | is.na(combined_mass_g) & !is.na(remaining_prey) | combined_mass_g > 25)
bad_weight_stom$ec5_uuid_stom


bad_weight_fish <- fish %>% filter(fish_mass_g <= 0 | is.na(fish_mass_g) | fish_mass_g > 25)
bad_weight_fish$ec5_uuid_stom 

bad_weight_invert <- intact_invert %>% filter(intact_prey_mass_g <= 0 | is.na(intact_prey_mass_g | intact_prey_mass_g > 25))
bad_weight_invert$ec5_uuid_stom 

#take a look at all the bad weights to see if any of them can be fixed

#create a list of bad weights - add a column to any printed data frame 
#that specifies to use these stomachs for presence-absence analysis only
#and replace weights with NA
bad_weight <- c(bad_weight_stom$ec5_uuid_stom, 
          bad_weight_fish$ec5_uuid_stom,
          bad_weight_invert$ec5_uuid_stom)
bad_weight

```

#Merge day and stom forms

```{r}
day_stom <- full_join(sampling_day, stom)
```


#Fix juvenile herring survey salmon entries

```{r}


jhs_clean <- day_stom %>% 
  filter(survey_name == "SOG Fall Juvenile Herring Survey") %>%
  filter(lavage_bag >= 60 & lavage_bag <= 117) %>%
  group_by(lavage_bag) %>%
  summarise(
    ec5_uuid_stom =
      ec5_uuid_stom[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    fish_prey_presence =
      fish_prey_presence[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    Fish_Brnch =
      Fish_Brnch[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    intact_prey_presence =
      intact_prey_presence[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    Intact_Prey_Brnch =
      Intact_Prey_Brnch[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    remaining_prey =
      remaining_prey[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    combined_mass_g =
      combined_mass_g[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    other_comments =
      other_comments[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    unk_prey_photo =
      unk_prey_photo[salmon_sample_type == "Stomach Contents ONLY"][1],
    analyst = coalesce(analyst[1], analyst[2]),
    across(everything(), ~ .x[salmon_sample_type == "Whole Fish"][1]))

#check for duplicated codes
test <- jhs_clean[duplicated(jhs_clean$salmon_code_SI) | 
                    duplicated(jhs_clean$salmon_code_SI, fromLast = TRUE), ]
nrow(test)
test$salmon_code_SI

jhs_clean <- jhs_clean %>% 
  mutate(salmon_code_SI = case_when(
    salmon_code_SI == "JHS_082" & lavage_bag == 81 ~ "JHS_081",
    salmon_code_SI == "JHS_110" & lavage_bag == 111 ~ "JHS_111",
    TRUE ~ salmon_code_SI))

nrow(day_stom)

day_stom <- day_stom %>%
  filter(
    is.na(survey_name) | is.na(lavage_bag) |
  !(survey_name == "SOG Fall Juvenile Herring Survey" &
    lavage_bag >= 60 & lavage_bag <= 117))

day_stom <- rbind(day_stom, jhs_clean)

nrow(day_stom)

```

#Clean dates

```{r}
day_stom <- day_stom %>%
  mutate(year = year(date),
         month = month(date),
         day = day(date)) %>%
  relocate(year, .before = date) %>%
  relocate(month, .after = year) %>%
  relocate(day, .after = month) %>%
  #manually update year for sample without date (based on correspondence with Matt Thompson)
  mutate(year = case_when(ec5_uuid_day == "b14e369b-36a4-4223-b547-e8729f1608a5" ~ 2024,
                          TRUE ~ year))

test <- day_stom %>% filter(ec5_uuid_day == "b14e369b-36a4-4223-b547-e8729f1608a5")

```

#Main data 1: presence-absence by group

```{r}

fish_summ <- fish %>%
  group_by(ec5_uuid_stom, fish_species) %>%
  summarise(fish_mass_g = sum(fish_mass_g)) %>%
  pivot_wider(values_from = fish_mass_g, names_from = fish_species, 
              names_prefix = "mass_g_") 

fish_summ2 <- fish %>%
  group_by(ec5_uuid_stom) %>%
  summarize(fish_taxa = paste(sort(unique(fish_species)),collapse=", "))

fish_summ <- full_join(fish_summ, fish_summ2)


intact_invert_summ <- intact_invert %>%
  group_by(ec5_uuid_stom) %>%
  summarise(intact_prey_taxa = toString(intact_prey_taxa),
            intact_prey_mass_g = sum(intact_prey_mass_g)) 


combinedA <- day_stom %>% 
  full_join(fish_summ) %>% 
  full_join(intact_invert_summ) 

nrow(day_stom) - nrow(combinedA)

#presence absence data
colnames(combinedA)
combinedA <- combinedA %>%
  unite(., col = "all_prey",  fish_taxa, intact_prey_taxa, remaining_prey, 
        na.rm=TRUE, sep = ", ")

#Function to remove duplicates from the 'all_prey' column
remove_duplicates_in_column <- function(prey) {
  #split the string by commas, remove duplicates, and join back into a string
  prey_list <- unlist(strsplit(prey, ", "))
  unique_prey <- unique(prey_list)
  return(paste(unique_prey, collapse = ", "))
}

#apply the function to the all_prey column
combinedA$all_prey <- sapply(combinedA$all_prey, remove_duplicates_in_column)

#replace blanks "" with NA
combinedA <- combinedA %>% mutate(all_prey = case_when(all_prey == "" ~ NA,
                                                       TRUE ~ all_prey))

#check that all were removed
combinedA %>% filter(all_prey == "")
combinedA %>% filter(is.na(all_prey))

#add invertebrate masses together
combinedA <- combinedA %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(mass_g_Invertebrate = sum(combined_mass_g, intact_prey_mass_g, 
                                   na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(combined_mass_g, intact_prey_mass_g))

#add in winter ecology data
combinedA <- full_join(combinedA, stom_summary_we)

nrow(combinedA) - (nrow(day_stom) + nrow(stom_summary_we))


#add columns with note about bad weights and replace weights with NA
combinedA <- combinedA %>%
  mutate(analysis_type = case_when(ec5_uuid_stom %in% bad_weight ~ "Presence/Absence Only")) %>%
  mutate(across(contains("Mass_g_"), ~ if_else(ec5_uuid_stom %in% bad_weight, NA, .)))

#select columns of interest
combinedA <- combinedA %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ec5_uuid_stom, created_at, analysis_date, year, month, day, date, 
    general_location, team, event_type, bag_comments, survey_name, 
    trawl_cruise, trawl_species_code, JHS_transect,	JHS_station,
    salmon_species, trawl_set, lavage_bag, salmon_sample_type, salmon_mass_g, 
    salmon_FL_mm, salmon_clip_status, salmon_tag_status, salmon_tag_id,
    salmon_scale_status, scale_book, scale_no, salmon_code_SI,
    salmon_fin_lower_SI, salmon_fin_upper_SI, salmon_fin_DNA, salmon_muscle_SI, 
    salmon_heart, all_prey, mass_g_Invertebrate,
    contains("Mass_g"), analysis_type, analyst) %>%
  arrange(date, general_location, lavage_bag)


write.csv(combinedA, paste0(Download_Date, "-psf-herring-A1-stom-stomach-summary.csv"))


```

#Main data 2: prey fish details

```{r}
combinedB <- right_join(day_stom, fish)

nrow(combinedB) - nrow(fish)

combinedB <- full_join(combinedB, stom_fish_we)

nrow(combinedB) - (nrow(fish) + nrow(stom_fish_we))

#add columns with note about bad weights - replace weights with NA
combinedB <- combinedB %>%
  mutate(analysis_type = case_when(ec5_uuid_stom %in% bad_weight ~ "Presence/Absence Only"))  %>%
  mutate(across(contains("Mass_g_"), ~ if_else(ec5_uuid_stom %in% bad_weight, NA, .)))

combinedB <- combinedB %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ec5_uuid_stom, created_at, analysis_date, year, month, day, date, 
    general_location, team, event_type, bag_comments, survey_name, trawl_cruise, 
    trawl_species_code, trawl_set, JHS_transect,	JHS_station,
    lavage_bag, salmon_sample_type, salmon_mass_g, salmon_FL_mm, 
    salmon_clip_status, salmon_tag_status, salmon_tag_id,
    colnames(fish), analysis_type, analyst) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(ec5_branch_uuid, fish_photo, fish_sample_SI, fish_storage_SI)) %>%
  arrange(date, general_location, lavage_bag)

write.csv(combinedB, paste0(Download_Date, "-psf-herring-A1-stom-fish-prey", ".csv"))

```


#Prey stable isotope data

Invertebrate prey saved for stable isotopes are recorded in the intact prey branch. Fish prey saved for stable isotopes are recorded in the fish branch. We need to combine these two forms to get the full list of SI samples.

```{r}

## Invert SI Samples ##

intact_invert2 <- intact_invert %>% 
  #combine specific taxa info and sample comments into a single column
  unite("comments", intact_prey_species, intact_prey_comments, 
        na.rm=TRUE, sep = "; ", remove = TRUE) %>%
  #remove columns
  dplyr::select(-c(created_at, uploaded_at, created_by, title, 
                   intact_prey_photo)) %>%
  #rename columns for better cross references
  rename(prey_taxa = intact_prey_taxa,
         sample_type = intact_prey_sample,
         analysis_type = intact_prey_analysis,
         mass_g = intact_prey_mass_g,
         storage_container = intact_prey_storage,
         sample_number = intact_prey_code,
         quality = intact_prey_quality)

## Prey Fish SI Samples ##

#extract data for prey fish saved for stable isotopes
fish_SI <- fish %>%
  mutate(analysis_type = "Stable Isotope") %>%
  #filter rows with a SI sample number recorded
  filter(!is.na(fish_code_SI)) %>%
  #remove columns not of interest
  dplyr::select(-c(id_features, otolith_count, fish_photo)) %>%
  #rename columns for better cross references
  rename(prey_taxa = fish_species,
         comments = fish_comments,
         mass_g = fish_mass_g,
         sample_type = fish_sample_SI,
         storage_container = fish_storage_SI,
         sample_number = fish_code_SI)


#merge invert and fish SI forms
full_SI <- full_join(intact_invert2, fish_SI) 
  
nrow(full_SI) - (nrow(intact_invert2) + nrow(fish_SI))

#move columns around 
full_SI <- full_SI %>%
  dplyr::select(c("ec5_uuid_stom", "ec5_branch_uuid", "analysis_type", "prey_taxa",
                  "sample_number", "mass_g", "sample_type", "storage_container",
                  "digestion_score", "fish_SL_mm", "otolith_vial", "quality", "comments"))

full_SI <- sampling_day %>%
  full_join(day_stom) %>%
  right_join(full_SI) 

#add winter ecology data
full_SI <- full_join(full_SI, stom_isotope_we)

nrow(full_SI) - (nrow(intact_invert2) + nrow(fish_SI) + nrow(stom_isotope_we))

#entries with prey taxa = OTHER
test <- full_SI %>% filter(prey_taxa == "Other")
#looks like the actual taxa is in the comments (yay)
#assign these on a case-by-case basis for now
full_SI <- full_SI %>%
  mutate(prey_taxa = case_when(grepl("Brittle star", comments) ~ "Ophiuroids",
                               TRUE ~ prey_taxa))
#check that all were replaced
nrow(full_SI %>% filter(prey_taxa == "Other"))

#entries with no prey taxa recorded - go back to look at physical samples
full_SI %>% filter(is.na(prey_taxa))

#fix any error codes
unique(full_SI$sample_number)

full_SI <- full_SI %>%
  mutate(sample_number = gsub("I25 ", "I25-", sample_number),
         sample_number = gsub("I24 ", "I24-", sample_number))

full_SI <- full_SI %>% mutate(
  sample_number = case_when(
    sample_number == "H25-0113" ~ "I25-0292",
    sample_number == "I25-0183" & prey_taxa == "CrabMegalops" ~ "I25-0182",
    TRUE ~ sample_number))

#select columns of interest
full_SI <- full_SI %>%
  dplyr::select(ec5_uuid_stom, created_at, analysis_date, year, month, day,
                date, general_location, team, lavage_bag,
                survey_name, trawl_cruise, trawl_set, trawl_species_code,
                JHS_transect, JHS_station, event_type, prey_taxa, sample_number,
                mass_g, sample_type, storage_container, fish_SL_mm, otolith_vial,
                quality, comments,
                -c(ec5_uuid_day, ec5_branch_uuid)) %>%
  #sort data frame by sample number
  arrange(sample_number)


write.csv(full_SI, paste0(Download_Date, "-psf-herring-A1-stom-isotope-prey", ".csv"))

```

```{r}
combinedA %>%
  group_by(survey_name, year, trawl_cruise, salmon_sample_type) %>% 
           # salmon_sample_type) %>%
  # filter(survey_name == "SOG Midwater Salmon Trawl") %>%
  summarise(count = n())
```

```{r}
test <- combinedA %>%
  mutate(
    Herring = case_when(grepl("Herring", all_prey) ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0),
    doy = yday(date)) %>%
  filter(survey_name == "BCSRIF Herring") %>%
  dplyr::select(year, date, doy, general_location, all_prey, Herring)
    
ggplot(data = test) +
  geom_col(aes(x = doy, y = Herring, fill = as.factor(year))) +
  facet_wrap(~general_location, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw()


```
